ab: Ciang sipungulik madas ispapatas? adu mahtuas mapasimulku.
ch: W:Ciang，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Ciang, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: ukanik amin, sain hai itu Puni cia.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Puni’s.

ab: adu mahtu simulunku tu muiav? na maaipi saikin masuhis.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎?我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: ung, sizavang makusia.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: uninang, kadangzavik tahus Puni tu uninang.
en: Thank you and thank Puni for me.

ab: na maz sizaun su?
en: May I help you?

ab: na masuhisik mai-dusa tu ahil tan.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: ung, mazang na sizaun su?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: na simulangik ahil tan tu mai-tau.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: ung. suhaisav mais tal-ciunin, katu sipungul hai.
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: niangas maisuhis mas inak tu ishahaishais hai.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: suhaisunin ku takna i.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: amus nauka saduanku a ishahaishais tu.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: adu ispasimul su mas Husung cia hai.
en: Did you lend it to Husung?

ab: nik haiap, natupaunku saia i.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: tangusun kuas mapasimul inak tu ishahaishais tan.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Puni, paisimulanas Husung cias pakaapavun tu ulustan aupa?
en: Puni, did Husung lend you this coat?

ab: ni, iscina sain tu sinbaliv masaivku.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: mamaszang isu pakaapavunas itu Husung cia.
en: Husung’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: isaicia pakaapavun hai matahdung, ni inam patas mamaszang.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Puni, adu sinimulas sui sia Husung cia?
en: Puni, did you borrow money from Husung?

ab: aiza, ana suhaisunku hanian, kazasia sipungul saikin madas sui.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: ungat, na lakuas masuhis.
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: na suhaisunku kutunin.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: ungat, nakadangazun kuas tahus Husung cia.
en: Okay, I will tell Husung for you.
